productName: Stingers - 5pk .5g Liquid Diamonds Pre-Rolls - Memory Loss - 2.5g
description: Ready-to-spark sativa infused pre-roll of Memory Loss, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of ammonia, pepper, and woody, delivering a bright, heady lift. Pace yourself.
